message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts
Failing test: "unknown item type in quote throws an error"
Passing tests so far: 18

Make `runScenario` (or the quote processing path) throw an Error when an item.type is not in BASE_PREMIUMS.

Minimal implementation: when looking up an item's base premium, throw `new Error(\`Unknown item type: ${item.type}\`)` if not found.

Make sure all 18 existing tests still pass — items with known types (sword, amulet, staff, potion, rune, moonstone) should not throw.

Run `pnpm test` to verify all 19 pass.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement the minimal change needed.
Now I'll make the minimal change to throw an error when an item type is unknown.

content.text:
All 19 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Modified `itemBasePremium` in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-17_03-23-26_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts` to throw `Error(\`Unknown item type: ${item.type}\`)` when `item.type` is not a key in `BASE_PREMIUMS`.
**Result**: All 19 tests now pass (18 previous + 1 new).
**Approach**: This is the minimal change — added a guard at the single point where base premiums are looked up. Items with known types (sword, amulet, staff, potion, rune, moonstone) take the normal path; unknown types throw immediately. No refactoring or speculative validation added.

Relevant file:
- `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-17_03-23-26_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts`
